陈观楼获得长生后，就在天牢谋了一个狱卒铁饭碗，开始了每天上班摸鱼的日子。
在漫长的岁月中，看他起高楼，看他楼塌了。看他今朝荣登天子堂，明日做那阶下囚。看他家族富贵，看他夷三族。看他王权富贵，看他国破家亡。
变化的是岁月人生，不变的是长生岁月。陈观楼熬死了宗师，熬死了大宗师，熬死了一个个大佬，终究成为无敌的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/af90d3542c6b6de0a905a6092d66e767","author":"戒界","author_id":"","book_id":"7309742129457138738","book_name":"我在天牢，长生不死","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"40万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7309743954679988763","read_count":"399751","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3469258"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1672","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,无敌,无女主,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2aa579be2f933deff1c50f7087f7b60c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436501&x-signature=wt0ARVLmAEvOQr3mOYoLZdQgXqk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110323900009","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"94"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155501D1ACC28CB66835343EF3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
